title: Senior/Principal Scientist - Synthetic Molecule Analytical Chemistry (SMAC)
notes: EXCEPTIONAL MATCH. Genentech SMAC group seeks analytical chemist for small molecules, peptides, oligonucleotides, and drug delivery systems (LNP, polymer nanoparticles). Varun's postdoc is biopolymer nanoparticle process dev - direct pipeline alignment. Requires HRMS, UHPLC, 2D-LC/MS, GC/MS, spectroscopy, rheology, microscopy. PhD + 0-2 years for Senior Scientist. Salary $124K-$231K (Senior) / $143K-$266K (Principal). Relocation benefits available. Published ~1 week ago, still active on Genentech careers.

evaluation.recommendation: APPLY IMMEDIATELY - One of the strongest matches in the tracker
strengths: Postdoc is literally biopolymer nanoparticle process development - matches LNP/polymer nanoparticle pipeline
PhD in Chemistry with 0-2 years accepted for Senior Scientist level
Multi-technique characterization expertise (FT-IR, UV-Vis, TGA, DSC, cyclic voltammetry, NMR, GC-MS, LC-MS)
Analytical method development from first principles
Materials characterization and structure-property relationships expertise
gaps: No direct HRMS method development experience (some LC-MS/GC-MS exposure)

gaps: Core role is synthetic organic chemistry — not analytical/characterization focused

GMP synthesis for human ADME studies requires regulatory knowledge
